MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Franck Sauty, is present.
Attorney, David Wasserman, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Gene Feaster , is present.
Attorney, Laila Laridas , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Quidachy, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-29-2010 is vacated.
